_description:
Reproduction fixture for Q3.6-2 (Qwen3.6 empty-<think> history guard, R1 port). Conversation has a HISTORY assistant turn with empty reasoning_content. Even after Q3.6-1 (preserve_thinking default-on), the patched template still wraps that turn in '<think>

</think>

' — wasting context tokens and breaking prefix-cache symmetry. Q3.6-2 adds an `and reasoning_content` guard so the wrapper is only emitted when there is actual reasoning content to preserve.
_bug: Same family as R1 (QwenLM/Qwen3 issue #1826). Specific to Qwen3.6 because Q3.6-1's polarity flip exposes the empty-reasoning case more frequently.

messages.content: Hello! How can I help you?
